text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet little town named Serene, lived a wise owl named Oliver. Every evening, Oliver would sit on his favorite oak tree by the town pond. His circle of friends included a humble squirrel named Spike, an industrious rabbit named Rosa, and a mischievous cat known only as Whiskers.

One sunny afternoon, while the town was busy with summer festivals, Whiskers decided to wander too far from home. He pranced down an unfamiliar path and ended up at the edge of a mysterious forest. The trees were unfamiliar, the sounds strange, and the undergrowth thick.

Oliver knew something was wrong. After all, Whiskers had never ventured far before. He set off in pursuit, using his keen eyesight to spot the little cat. After what felt like an unnervingly long time, Oliver finally caught sight of Whiskers struggling with something in the trees.

Oliver swooped down. "Hey there, Whiskers
